Warm morning sun low across the sidewalk, long shadows stretching from the dog and her shoes, the street behind softly out of focus. Real unflattering older skin shown honestly: visible pores, oily T-zone shine, blemishes, redness, broken capillaries, blotchy uneven tone, deep wrinkles, eye bags, age spots, grey or thinning hair, dry patches, never smoothed or retouched. Caught not posed, slightly awkward amateur framing, an ordinary weathered real person, not a render. Output only the photo, no text, captions, watermark or graphics.
